1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion guard
    24→test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    25→ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Colophon registry initialization
    29→
    30→# shellcheck disable=SC2034,SC2154
    31→zrbz_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
    35→  zbuz_sentinel
    36→
    37→  # Payor commands
    38→  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    39→  buz_blazon RBZ_CREATE_DEPOT   "rbw-PC" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_create"
    40→  buz_blazon RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL  "rbw-PI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"
    41→  buz_blazon RBZ_DESTROY_DEPOT  "rbw-PD" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_destroy"
    42→  buz_blazon RBZ_GOVERNOR_RESET "rbw-PG" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_reset"
    43→  z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"
    44→  buz_blazon RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH "rbw-PE" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    45→  buz_blazon RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH   "rbw-PR" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_refresh"
    46→  buz_blazon RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD     "rbw-QB" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_quota_build"
    47→
    48→  # General depot operations
    49→  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
    50→  buz_blazon RBZ_LIST_DEPOT  "rbw-ld" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"
    51→
    52→  # Governor commands
    53→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    54→  buz_blazon RBZ_CREATE_RETRIEVER "rbw-GR" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_retriever"
    55→  buz_blazon RBZ_CREATE_DIRECTOR  "rbw-GD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_create_director"
    56→
    57→  # Admin commands
    58→  z_mod="rbgm_cli.sh"
    59→  buz_blazon RBZ_ADMIN_ESTABLISH "rbw-ps" "${z_mod}" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    60→  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
    61→  buz_blazon RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS  "rbw-Gl" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_list_service_accounts"
    62→  buz_blazon RBZ_DELETE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT "rbw-GS" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_delete_service_account"
    63→
    64→  # Ark commands (paired -image + -about artifacts)
    65→  z_mod="rbf_cli.sh"
    66→  buz_blazon RBZ_ABJURE_ARK  "rbw-aA" "${z_mod}" "rbf_abjure"
    67→  buz_blazon RBZ_BESEECH_ARK "rbw-ab" "${z_mod}" "rbf_beseech"
    68→  buz_blazon RBZ_CONJURE_ARK "rbw-aC" "${z_mod}" "rbf_build"
    69→  buz_blazon RBZ_SUMMON_ARK  "rbw-as" "${z_mod}" "rbf_summon"
    70→
    71→  # Image commands (single artifact)
    72→  buz_blazon RBZ_BUILD_IMAGE    "rbw-iB" "${z_mod}" "rbf_build"
    73→  buz_blazon RBZ_DELETE_IMAGE   "rbw-iD" "${z_mod}" "rbf_delete"
    74→  buz_blazon RBZ_LIST_IMAGES    "rbw-il" "${z_mod}" "rbf_list"
    75→  buz_blazon RBZ_RETRIEVE_IMAGE "rbw-ir" "${z_mod}" "rbf_retrieve"
    76→
    77→  # Nameplate regime operations
    78→  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
    79→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE   "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "render"
    80→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "validate"
    81→
    82→  # Vessel regime operations
    83→  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
    84→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL   "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "render"
    85→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "validate"
    86→
    87→  # Repo regime operations
    88→  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
    89→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_REPO      "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"
    90→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO    "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"
    91→  buz_blazon RBZ_REFRESH_GCB_PINS "rbw-rrg" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins"
    92→
    93→  # Payor regime operations
    94→  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
    95→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR   "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "render"
    96→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "validate"
    97→
    98→  # OAuth regime operations
    99→  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
   100→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH   "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "render"
   101→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "validate"
   102→
   103→  # Station regime operations
   104→  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
   105→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_STATION   "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "render"
   106→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "validate"
   107→
   108→  # Auth regime operations
   109→  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
   110→  buz_blazon RBZ_RENDER_AUTH   "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "render"
   111→  buz_blazon RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "validate"
   112→  buz_blazon RBZ_LIST_AUTH     "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "list"
   113→
   114→  # Cross-nameplate operations
   115→  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
   116→  buz_blazon RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES "rbw-ni" "${z_mod}" "survey"
   117→  buz_blazon RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES  "rbw-nv" "${z_mod}" "audit"
   118→
   119→  # Bottle operations (imprint-translated by workbench case arm, not zbuz_exec_lookup)
   120→  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
   121→  buz_blazon RBZ_BOTTLE_START   "rbw-s" "${z_mod}" "rbob_start"
   122→  buz_blazon RBZ_BOTTLE_SENTRY  "rbw-S" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_sentry"
   123→  buz_blazon RBZ_BOTTLE_CENSER  "rbw-C" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_censer"
   124→  buz_blazon RBZ_BOTTLE_CONNECT "rbw-B" "${z_mod}" "rbob_connect_bottle"
   125→  buz_blazon RBZ_BOTTLE_OBSERVE "rbw-o" "${z_mod}" "rbob_observe"
   126→
   127→  # Qualification operations
   128→  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
   129→  buz_blazon RBZ_QUALIFY_ALL "rbw-qa" "${z_mod}" "qualify_all"
   130→
   131→  # Test operations (module is testbench, command is colophon)
   132→  z_mod="rbtb_testbench.sh"
   133→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_ALL                "rbw-ta"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-ta"
   134→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_SUITE              "rbw-ts"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-ts"
   135→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_ONE                "rbw-to"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-to"
   136→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_NAMEPLATE          "rbw-tn"  "${z_mod}" "rbw-tn"
   137→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_REGIME             "rbw-trg" "${z_mod}" "rbw-trg"
   138→  buz_blazon RBZ_TEST_REGIME_CREDENTIALS "rbw-trc" "${z_mod}" "rbw-trc"
   139→
   140→  ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
   141→}
   142→
   143→######################################################################
   144→# Internal sentinel
   145→
   146→zrbz_sentinel() {
   147→  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
   148→}
   149→
   150→# eof
   151→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBW Workbench - Routes Recipe Bottle commands to CLIs
    20→#
    21→# Bottle operations (require moniker imprint, explicit case arms):
    22→#   rbw-s   Start service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   rbw-z   Stop service
    24→#   rbw-S   Connect to sentry container
    25→#   rbw-C   Connect to censer container
    26→#   rbw-B   Connect to bottle container
    27→#   rbw-o   Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#
    29→# All other commands dispatch via zipper registry (zbuz_exec_lookup).
    30→# See rbz_zipper.sh for the complete colophon→CLI→command mapping.
    31→
    32→set -euo pipefail
    33→
    34→# Get script directory
    35→RBW_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    36→
    37→# Source dependencies
    38→source "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    39→source "${BURC_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
    40→source "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buz_zipper.sh"
    41→source "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbz_zipper.sh"
    42→
    43→# Show filename on each displayed line
    44→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    45→
    46→# Kindle dispatch and zipper registry
    47→zburd_kindle
    48→zbuz_kindle
    49→zrbz_kindle
    50→
    51→# Verbose output if BURE_VERBOSE is set
    52→rbw_show() {
    53→  test "${BURE_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBWSHOW: $*"
    54→}
    55→
    56→######################################################################
    57→# Routing
    58→
    59→rbw_route() {
    60→  local z_command="$1"
    61→  shift
    62→
    63→  rbw_show "Routing command: ${z_command} with args: $*"
    64→
    65→  zburd_sentinel
    66→
    67→  rbw_show "BURD environment verified"
    68→
    69→  # Route based on colophon
    70→  case "${z_command}" in
    71→
    72→    # Bottle operations (non-degenerate: translate imprint to RBOB_MONIKER)
    73→    rbw-s|rbw-z|rbw-S|rbw-C|rbw-B|rbw-o)
    74→      local z_rbob_cli="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_cli.sh"
    75→      test -n "${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}" || buc_die "${z_command} requires moniker imprint (BURD_TOKEN_3)"
    76→      export RBOB_MONIKER="${BURD_TOKEN_3}"
    77→      # Qualification gate: die before starting services
    78→      test "${z_command}" != "rbw-s" || {
    79→        "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbq_cli.sh" qualify_all || buc_die "Qualification gate failed for service start"
    80→      }
    81→      case "${z_command}" in
    82→        rbw-s)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_start          ;;
    83→        rbw-z)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_stop           ;;
    84→        rbw-S)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_sentry ;;
    85→        rbw-C)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_censer ;;
    86→        rbw-B)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_bottle ;;
    87→        rbw-o)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_observe        ;;
    88→      esac
    89→      ;;
    90→
    91→    # Cloud build with qualification gate
    92→    rbw-iB)
    93→      "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbq_cli.sh" qualify_all || buc_die "Qualification gate failed for cloud build"
    94→      zbuz_exec_lookup "${z_command}" "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}" "$@" || buc_die "Failed to dispatch ${z_command}"
    95→      ;;
    96→
    97→    # All other commands: resolve via zipper registry
    98→    *)
    99→      zbuz_exec_lookup "${z_command}" "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}" "$@" || {
   100→        if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
   101→          buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
   102→        fi
   103→        buc_info "Available command groups:"
   104→        buc_info ""
   105→        buc_info "Bottle operations (require moniker imprint):"
   106→        buc_info "  rbw-s   Start service (sentry + censer + bottle)"
   107→        buc_info "  rbw-z   Stop service"
   108→        buc_info "  rbw-S   Connect to sentry container"
   109→        buc_info "  rbw-C   Connect to censer container"
   110→        buc_info "  rbw-B   Connect to bottle container"
   111→        buc_info "  rbw-o   Observe network traffic (tcpdump)"
   112→        buc_info ""
   113→        buc_info "Payor commands:"
   114→        buc_info "  rbw-PC  Create depot          rbw-PI  Install payor"
   115→        buc_info "  rbw-PD  Destroy depot          rbw-PE  Establish payor"
   116→        buc_info "  rbw-PG  Reset governor         rbw-PR  Refresh payor"
   117→        buc_info "  rbw-QB  Quota build"
   118→        buc_info ""
   119→        buc_info "General operations:"
   120→        buc_info "  rbw-ld  List depots"
   121→        buc_info ""
   122→        buc_info "Governor commands:"
   123→        buc_info "  rbw-GR  Create retriever       rbw-GD  Create director"
   124→        buc_info ""
   125→        buc_info "Admin commands:"
   126→        buc_info "  rbw-ps  Establish payor (admin)"
   127→        buc_info "  rbw-Gl  List service accounts  rbw-GS  Delete service account"
   128→        buc_info ""
   129→        buc_info "Ark commands:"
   130→        buc_info "  rbw-aA  Abjure ark             rbw-ab  Beseech ark"
   131→        buc_info "  rbw-aC  Conjure ark            rbw-as  Summon ark"
   132→        buc_info ""
   133→        buc_info "Image commands:"
   134→        buc_info "  rbw-iB  Build image            rbw-iD  Delete image"
   135→        buc_info "  rbw-il  List images             rbw-ir  Retrieve image"
   136→        buc_info ""
   137→        buc_info "Nameplate regime operations:"
   138→        buc_info "  rbw-rnr Render nameplate regime"
   139→        buc_info "  rbw-rnv Validate nameplate regime"
   140→        buc_info ""
   141→        buc_info "Vessel regime operations:"
   142→        buc_info "  rbw-rvr Render vessel regime"
   143→        buc_info "  rbw-rvv Validate vessel regime"
   144→        buc_info ""
   145→        buc_info "Repo regime operations:"
   146→        buc_info "  rbw-rrr Render repo regime"
   147→        buc_info "  rbw-rrv Validate repo regime"
   148→        buc_info "  rbw-rrg Refresh GCB image pins"
   149→        buc_info ""
   150→        buc_info "Payor regime operations:"
   151→        buc_info "  rbw-rpr Render payor regime"
   152→        buc_info "  rbw-rpv Validate payor regime"
   153→        buc_info ""
   154→        buc_info "OAuth regime operations:"
   155→        buc_info "  rbw-ror Render OAuth regime"
   156→        buc_info "  rbw-rov Validate OAuth regime"
   157→        buc_info ""
   158→        buc_info "Station regime operations:"
   159→        buc_info "  rbw-rsr Render station regime"
   160→        buc_info "  rbw-rsv Validate station regime"
   161→        buc_info ""
   162→        buc_info "Auth regime operations (imprint: governor, retriever, director):"
   163→        buc_info "  rbw-rar Render auth regime     rbw-ral  List auth regimes"
   164→        buc_info "  rbw-rav Validate auth regime"
   165→        buc_info ""
   166→        buc_info "Cross-nameplate operations:"
   167→        buc_info "  rbw-ni  Survey nameplates"
   168→        buc_info "  rbw-nv  Audit nameplates"
   169→        buc_info ""
   170→        buc_info "Qualification operations:"
   171→        buc_info "  rbw-qa  Qualify all (tabtargets + colophons + nameplates)"
   172→        buc_info ""
   173→        buc_info "Test operations:"
   174→        buc_info "  rbw-ta  Run all test suites"
   175→        buc_info "  rbw-ts  Run single test suite"
   176→        buc_info "  rbw-to  Run single test function"
   177→        buc_info "  rbw-tn  Run nameplate suite (imprint: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)"
   178→        buc_info "  rbw-trg Run regime-smoke suite"
   179→        buc_info "  rbw-trc Run regime-credentials suite"
   180→        return 0
   181→      }
   182→      ;;
   183→  esac
   184→}
   185→
   186→rbw_main() {
   187→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   188→  shift || true
   189→
   190→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   191→
   192→  rbw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   193→}
   194→
   195→rbw_main "$@"
   196→
   197→# eof
   198→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB CLI - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle command-line interface
    20→#
    21→# Commands:
    22→#   start           Start bottle service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   stop            Stop bottle service
    24→#   connect_sentry  Connect to sentry container
    25→#   connect_censer  Connect to censer container
    26→#   connect_bottle  Connect to bottle container
    27→#   observe         Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#   info            Show container names, network, and runtime
    29→#   validate        Validate configuration is complete
    30→
    31→set -euo pipefail
    32→
    33→ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Source all dependencies
    36→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    37→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    38→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
    39→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    40→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    41→source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    42→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
    43→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
    44→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"
    45→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rboo_observe.sh"
    46→
    47→######################################################################
    48→# CLI Commands
    49→
    50→rbob_validate() {
    51→  zrbob_sentinel
    52→
    53→  buc_doc_brief "Validate that RBOB configuration is complete and runnable"
    54→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBOB Validate: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    57→
    58→  # All values computed at kindle - just verify they exist
    59→  test -n "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_RUNTIME not set"
    60→  test -n "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_SENTRY not set"
    61→  test -n "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_CENSER not set"
    62→  test -n "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_BOTTLE not set"
    63→  test -n "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_NETWORK not set"
    64→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    65→
    66→  buc_step "RBOB configuration valid"
    67→  echo "Moniker:   ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    68→  echo "Runtime:   ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}"
    69→  echo "Sentry:    ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
    70→  echo "Censer:    ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
    71→  echo "Bottle:    ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
    72→  echo "Network:   ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
    73→}
    74→
    75→rbob_info() {
    76→  zrbob_sentinel
    77→
    78→  buc_doc_brief "Show container names, network, and runtime for kindled nameplate"
    79→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    80→
    81→  buc_step "RBOB Info: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    82→  echo "Runtime:   ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}"
    83→  echo "Sentry:    ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
    84→  echo "Censer:    ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
    85→  echo "Bottle:    ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
    86→  echo "Network:   ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
    87→  echo "Sentry IP: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}"
    88→  echo "Bottle IP: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
    89→}
    90→
    91→rbob_observe() {
    92→  zrbob_sentinel
    93→
    94→  buc_doc_brief "Observe network traffic on bottle service containers"
    95→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    96→
    97→  # Kindle observe module and delegate
    98→  zrboo_kindle
    99→  rboo_observe
   100→}
   101→
   102→######################################################################
   103→# Furnish and Main
   104→
   105→zrbob_furnish() {
   106→  buc_doc_env "RBOB_MONIKER        " "Nameplate moniker (e.g., nsproto)"
   107→
   108→  local z_moniker="${RBOB_MONIKER:-}"
   109→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "RBOB_MONIKER environment variable required"
   110→
   111→  zbuv_kindle
   112→  zrbcc_kindle
   113→
   114→  # Load nameplate
   115→  rbrn_load_moniker "${z_moniker}"
   116→
   117→  zrbrr_kindle
   118→  zrbrr_enforce
   119→
   120→  # Kindle depot constants (provides RBGD_GAR_LOCATION, RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID for image URLs)
   121→  zrbgc_kindle
   122→  zrbgd_kindle
   123→
   124→  # Kindle RBOB (validates RBRN and RBRR are ready)
   125→  zrbob_kindle
   126→}
   127→
   128→buc_execute rbob_ "Recipe Bottle Orchestration" zrbob_furnish "$@"
   129→
   130→# eof
   131→

   236→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_allow_anthropic_tcase
   237→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_block_google_tcase
   238→
   239→  # srjcl-jupyter suite

   242→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_jupyter_running_tcase

   244→
   245→  # pluml-diagram suite

   252→
   253→  # regime-smoke suite
   254→  butr_suite_enroll "regime-smoke" "" "zrbtb_regime_tsuite_setup"

   260→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrp_tcase
   261→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burd_tcase
   262→
   263→  # regime-credentials suite (requires workstation credentials)
   264→  butr_suite_enroll "regime-credentials" "" "zrbtb_credentials_tsuite_setup"
   265→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbra_tcase
   266→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbro_tcase
   267→  butr_case_enroll "regime-credentials" butcrg_rbrs_tcase
   268→
   269→  # xname-validation suite
   270→  butr_suite_enroll "xname-validation" "" "zrbtb_xname_tsuite_setup"
   271→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_debug_tcase
   272→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_defaults_tcase
   273→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_empty_optional_tcase
   274→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_env_wrapper_tcase
   275→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_chars_tcase
   276→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_start_tcase
   277→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_length_tcase
   278→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_valid_tcase
   279→
   280→}
   281→
   282→######################################################################
   283→# Routing
   284→
   285→rbtb_route() {
   286→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   287→  shift || true
   288→
   289→  zburd_sentinel
   290→
   291→  rbtb_kindle
   292→
   293→  export ZBUTE_ROOT_TEMP_DIR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
   294→  export BUT_VERBOSE="${BUT_VERBOSE:-0}"
   295→
   296→  case "${z_command}" in
   297→    rbw-ta) butd_run_all ;;
   298→    rbw-ts) butd_run_suite "${1:-}" ;;
   299→    rbw-to) butd_run_one "${1:-}" ;;
   300→    rbw-tn)
   301→      local z_imprint="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
   302→      case "${z_imprint}" in
   303→        nsproto) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
   304→        srjcl)  butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
   305→        pluml)  butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
   306→        *)      buc_die "rbw-tn: unknown nameplate imprint '${z_imprint}' (expected: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)" ;;
   307→      esac
   308→      ;;
   309→    rbw-tap) butd_run_suite "access-probe" ;;
   310→    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
   311→    rbw-trc) butd_run_suite "regime-credentials" ;;
   312→    *)
   313→      if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
   314→        buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
   315→      fi
   316→      buc_info "Available test commands:"
   317→      buc_info "  rbw-ta   Run all suites"
   318→      buc_info "  rbw-ts   Run single suite (pass suite name)"
   319→      buc_info "  rbw-to   Run single test function (pass function name)"
   320→      buc_info "  rbw-tn   Run nameplate suite (imprint: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)"
   321→      buc_info "  rbw-tap  Run access-probe suite (OAuth/credential smoke test)"
   322→      buc_info "  rbw-trg  Run regime-smoke suite"
   323→      buc_info "  rbw-trc  Run regime-credentials suite"
   324→      return 0
   325→      ;;
   326→  esac
   327→}
   328→
   329→rbtb_main() {
   330→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   331→  shift || true
   332→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   333→  rbtb_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   334→}
   335→
   336→rbtb_main "$@"
   337→
   338→# eof
   339→

    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Common Constants - File paths and naming conventions
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBCC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBCC_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→# Literal constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
    28→RBCC_rbrr_file="rbrr.env"
    29→RBCC_rbrp_file="rbrp.env"
    30→RBCC_rbrn_prefix="rbrn_"
    31→RBCC_rbrn_ext=".env"
    32→
    33→######################################################################
    34→# Internal Functions (zrbcc_*)
    35→
    36→zrbcc_kindle() {
    37→  test -z "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc already kindled"
    38→  test -n "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURC_TOOLS_DIR not set - rbcc requires BURC environment"
    39→
    40→  # Kindle constants (depend on runtime state)
    41→  RBCC_KIT_DIR="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/rbw"
    42→
    43→  ZRBCC_KINDLED=1
    44→}
    45→
    46→zrbcc_sentinel() {
    47→  test "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbcc not kindled - call zrbcc_kindle first"
    48→}
    49→
    50→# eof
    51→

    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# BURD Regime - Bash Utility Regime Dispatch Module
    20→#
    21→# BURD is an ephemeral regime — variables are constructed by bud_dispatch.sh during
    22→# tabtarget execution, not sourced from a file.
    23→
    24→set -euo pipefail
    25→
    26→# Multiple inclusion detection
    27→test -z "${ZBURD_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module burd multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    28→ZBURD_SOURCED=1
    29→
    30→######################################################################
    31→# Internal Functions (zburd_*)
    32→
    33→zburd_kindle() {
    34→  test -z "${ZBURD_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module burd already kindled"
    35→
    36→  # Set defaults for all optional fields only (required ones are set by dispatch — don't overwrite)
    37→  BURD_NO_LOG="${BURD_NO_LOG:-}"
    38→  BURD_INTERACTIVE="${BURD_INTERACTIVE:-}"
    39→  BURD_TOKEN_3="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
    40→  BURD_TOKEN_4="${BURD_TOKEN_4:-}"
    41→  BURD_TOKEN_5="${BURD_TOKEN_5:-}"
    42→
    43→  # Detect unexpected BURD_ variables
    44→  local z_known="BURD_REGIME_FILE BURD_STATION_FILE BURD_COORDINATOR_SCRIPT BURD_LAUNCHER BURD_TERM_COLS BURD_NOW_STAMP BURD_TEMP_DIR BURD_OUTPUT_DIR BURD_TRANSCRIPT BURD_GIT_CONTEXT BURD_TARGET BURD_COMMAND BURD_TOKEN_1 BURD_TOKEN_2 BURD_CLI_ARGS BURD_NO_LOG BURD_INTERACTIVE BURD_TOKEN_3 BURD_TOKEN_4 BURD_TOKEN_5 BURD_LOG_LAST BURD_LOG_SAME BURD_LOG_HIST"
    45→  ZBURD_UNEXPECTED=()
    46→  local z_var
    47→  for z_var in $(compgen -v BURD_); do
    48→    case " ${z_known} " in
    49→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    50→      *) ZBURD_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    51→    esac
    52→  done
    53→
    54→  ZBURD_KINDLED=1
    55→}
    56→
    57→zburd_sentinel() {
    58→  test "${ZBURD_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module burd not kindled - call zburd_kindle first"
    59→}
    60→
    61→# Validate BURD variables via buv_* (dies on first error)
    62→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
    63→zburd_validate_fields() {
    64→  zburd_sentinel
    65→
    66→  # Die on unexpected variables
    67→  if test ${#ZBURD_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
    68→    buc_die "Unexpected BURD_ variables: ${ZBURD_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
    69→  fi
    70→
    71→  # Launcher Configuration
    72→  buv_env_string BURD_REGIME_FILE           1 256
    73→  buv_env_string BURD_STATION_FILE          1 256
    74→  buv_env_string BURD_COORDINATOR_SCRIPT    1 256
    75→  buv_env_string BURD_LAUNCHER              1 256
    76→  buv_env_string BURD_TERM_COLS             1   8
    77→
    78→  # Computed State
    79→  buv_env_string BURD_NOW_STAMP             1  64
    80→  buv_env_string BURD_TEMP_DIR              1 256
    81→  buv_env_string BURD_OUTPUT_DIR            1 256
    82→  buv_env_string BURD_TRANSCRIPT            1 256
    83→  buv_env_string BURD_GIT_CONTEXT           1 128
    84→  # Parsed Tabtarget
    85→  buv_env_string BURD_TARGET                1 256
    86→  buv_env_string BURD_COMMAND               1  64
    87→  buv_env_string BURD_TOKEN_1               1  64
    88→  buv_env_string BURD_TOKEN_2               1 128
    89→
    90→  # BURD_CLI_ARGS is an array — skip validation (no buv_ for arrays)
    91→
    92→  # Conditional: log paths are set by dispatch but NOT exported, so they're only
    93→  # available in the dispatch process itself (not exec'd children).
    94→  # Validate only when both logging is active AND the variables are present.
    95→  if test -z "${BURD_NO_LOG:-}" && test -n "${BURD_LOG_LAST:-}"; then
    96→    buv_env_string BURD_LOG_LAST            1 256
    97→    buv_env_string BURD_LOG_SAME            1 256
    98→    buv_env_string BURD_LOG_HIST            1 256
    99→  fi
   100→
   101→  # BURD_NO_LOG, BURD_INTERACTIVE, BURD_TOKEN_3-5 are optional — not validated as required
   102→}
   103→
   104→# Render BURD regime state for diagnostic display
   105→# Prerequisite: zburd_kindle must have been called; bupr (PresentationRegime) must be sourced
   106→zburd_render() {
   107→  zburd_sentinel
   108→  type bupr_section_begin >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "zburd_render requires bupr (PresentationRegime) to be sourced"
   109→
   110→  echo ""
   111→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}BURD - Dispatch Runtime Regime${ZBUC_RESET}"
   112→  echo ""
   113→
   114→  # Launcher Configuration
   115→  bupr_section_begin "Launcher Configuration"
   116→  bupr_section_item BURD_REGIME_FILE           path   req  "Path to the BURC regime configuration file"
   117→  bupr_section_item BURD_STATION_FILE          path   req  "Path to the developer's BURS station file"
   118→  bupr_section_item BURD_COORDINATOR_SCRIPT    path   req  "Path to the coordinator script for this tabtarget"
   119→  bupr_section_item BURD_LAUNCHER              path   req  "Path to the tabtarget launcher script"
   120→  bupr_section_item BURD_TERM_COLS             string req  "Terminal column width at dispatch time"
   121→  bupr_section_end
   122→
   123→  # Computed State
   124→  bupr_section_begin "Computed State"
   125→  bupr_section_item BURD_NOW_STAMP             string req  "Timestamp string computed at dispatch time"
   126→  bupr_section_item BURD_TEMP_DIR              path   req  "Temporary directory for this invocation"
   127→  bupr_section_item BURD_OUTPUT_DIR            path   req  "Output directory for this invocation"
   128→  bupr_section_item BURD_TRANSCRIPT            path   req  "Path to transcript file for this invocation"
   129→  bupr_section_item BURD_GIT_CONTEXT           string req  "Git context string at dispatch time"
   130→  bupr_section_end
   131→
   132→  # Parsed Tabtarget
   133→  bupr_section_begin "Parsed Tabtarget"
   134→  bupr_section_item BURD_COMMAND               string req  "Command parsed from tabtarget filename"
   135→  bupr_section_item BURD_TARGET                string req  "Target parsed from tabtarget filename"
   136→  bupr_section_item BURD_TOKEN_1               string req  "First token parsed from tabtarget filename"
   137→  bupr_section_item BURD_TOKEN_2               string req  "Second token parsed from tabtarget filename"
   138→  bupr_section_item BURD_TOKEN_3               string opt  "Third token parsed from tabtarget filename (optional)"
   139→  bupr_section_item BURD_TOKEN_4               string opt  "Fourth token parsed from tabtarget filename (optional)"
   140→  bupr_section_item BURD_TOKEN_5               string opt  "Fifth token parsed from tabtarget filename (optional)"
   141→  bupr_section_end
   142→
   143→  # Caller Options
   144→  bupr_section_begin "Caller Options"
   145→  bupr_section_item BURD_NO_LOG                string opt  "Disable logging when set (empty means logging active)"
   146→  bupr_section_item BURD_INTERACTIVE           string opt  "Interactive mode flag when set"
   147→  bupr_section_end
   148→
   149→  # Log Paths (conditional: only when logging is active)
   150→  if test -z "${BURD_NO_LOG:-}"; then
   151→    bupr_section_begin "Log Paths"
   152→    bupr_section_item BURD_LOG_LAST            path   req  "Path to last-run log file"
   153→    bupr_section_item BURD_LOG_SAME            path   req  "Path to same-command log file"
   154→    bupr_section_item BURD_LOG_HIST            path   req  "Path to historical log file"
   155→    bupr_section_end
   156→  fi
   157→
   158→  # Unexpected variables
   159→  if test ${#ZBURD_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   160→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected BURD_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   161→    local z_var
   162→    for z_var in "${ZBURD_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   163→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   164→    done
   165→    echo ""
   166→  fi
   167→}
   168→
   169→# eof
   170→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# BUK Zipper - Colophon registry via parallel arrays with regime-selection channels
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion guard
    24→test -z "${ZBUZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    25→ZBUZ_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal kindle boilerplate
    29→
    30→zbuz_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZBUZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "buz already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Registry rolls (populated by buz_blazon in consumer kindle, same-process only)
    34→  z_buz_colophon_roll=()
    35→  z_buz_module_roll=()
    36→  z_buz_command_roll=()
    37→  z_buz_tabtarget_roll=()
    38→  z_buz_channel_roll=()
    39→
    40→  ZBUZ_KINDLED=1
    41→}
    42→
    43→######################################################################
    44→# Internal sentinel
    45→
    46→zbuz_sentinel() {
    47→  test "${ZBUZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module buz not kindled - call zbuz_kindle first"
    48→}
    49→
    50→######################################################################
    51→# Internal helpers
    52→
    53→# zbuz_resolve_tabtarget_capture() - Resolve colophon to tabtarget path
    54→# Args: colophon
    55→# Returns: tabtarget path or exit 1
    56→zbuz_resolve_tabtarget_capture() {
    57→  zbuz_sentinel
    58→
    59→  local z_colophon="${1:-}"
    60→  test -n "${z_colophon}" || return 1
    61→
    62→  local z_matches=("${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}/${z_colophon}."*.sh)
    63→
    64→  # Bash 3.2: no-match glob returns literal — check with test -e
    65→  test -e "${z_matches[0]}" || return 1
    66→
    67→  # Allow multiple matches (imprinted colophons share a colophon prefix)
    68→  # Return first match as representative
    69→  echo "${z_matches[0]}"
    70→}
    71→
    72→######################################################################
    73→# Public enroll (kindle-only registry population)
    74→
    75→# buz_blazon() - Register colophon tuple in parallel rolls
    76→# Args: varname, colophon, module, command [, channel]
    77→# Optional channel: "" (default), "imprint", or "param1"
    78→# Assigns colophon string to caller's variable via printf -v
    79→# Side effects: populates registry rolls (must be called in same process, NOT inside $())
    80→buz_blazon() {
    81→  zbuz_sentinel
    82→
    83→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
    84→  local z_colophon="${2:-}"
    85→  local z_module="${3:-}"
    86→  local z_command="${4:-}"
    87→  local z_channel="${5:-}"
    88→  test -n "${z_varname}"  || buc_die "buz_blazon: varname required"
    89→  test -n "${z_colophon}" || buc_die "buz_blazon: colophon required"
    90→  test -n "${z_module}"   || buc_die "buz_blazon: module required"
    91→  test -n "${z_command}"  || buc_die "buz_blazon: command required"
    92→
    93→  # Validate channel value
    94→  case "${z_channel}" in
    95→    ""|"imprint"|"param1") ;;
    96→    *) buc_die "buz_blazon: invalid channel: ${z_channel}" ;;
    97→  esac
    98→
    99→  # Validate variable name
   100→  echo "${z_varname}" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$' \
   101→    || buc_die "buz_blazon: invalid variable name: ${z_varname}"
   102→
   103→  # Validate at least one tabtarget exists (imprinted colophons may have multiple)
   104→  local z_tabtarget
   105→  z_tabtarget=$(zbuz_resolve_tabtarget_capture "${z_colophon}") || buc_die "No tabtarget for colophon '${z_colophon}' in ${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}/"
   106→
   107→  # Roll population (only persists in same-process context, lost in $() subshell)
   108→  z_buz_colophon_roll+=("${z_colophon}")
   109→  z_buz_module_roll+=("${z_module}")
   110→  z_buz_command_roll+=("${z_command}")
   111→  z_buz_tabtarget_roll+=("${z_tabtarget}")
   112→  z_buz_channel_roll+=("${z_channel}")
   113→
   114→  # Assign colophon to caller's variable
   115→  printf -v "${z_varname}" '%s' "${z_colophon}" || buc_die "buz_blazon: printf -v failed for ${z_varname}"
   116→}
   117→
   118→######################################################################
   119→# Internal folio decoder
   120→
   121→# zbuz_decode_folio() - Decode regime-selection folio from channel
   122→# Args: channel, [extra args to pass through]
   123→# Side effects: exports RBR0_FOLIO, sets z_buz_folio_args with remaining args
   124→zbuz_decode_folio() {
   125→  local z_channel="${1:-}"
   126→  shift
   127→
   128→  z_buz_folio_args=("$@")
   129→
   130→  case "${z_channel}" in
   131→    "")
   132→      # No-op: args pass through unchanged
   133→      ;;
   134→    "imprint")
   135→      export RBR0_FOLIO="${BURD_TOKEN_3}"
   136→      ;;
   137→    "param1")
   138→      test "${#z_buz_folio_args[@]}" -ge 1 || buc_die "zbuz_decode_folio: param1 channel requires at least 1 arg"
   139→      export RBR0_FOLIO="${z_buz_folio_args[0]}"
   140→      z_buz_folio_args=("${z_buz_folio_args[@]:1}")
   141→      ;;
   142→    *)
   143→      buc_die "zbuz_decode_folio: unknown channel: ${z_channel}"
   144→      ;;
   145→  esac
   146→}
   147→
   148→######################################################################
   149→# Lookup dispatch
   150→
   151→# zbuz_exec_lookup() - Resolve colophon via registry and exec
   152→# Args: colophon, base_dir [, extra args passed through to exec]
   153→# Execs: ${base_dir}/${module} ${command} [extra args]
   154→# Returns: 1 if colophon not found (does not exec)
   155→zbuz_exec_lookup() {
   156→  zbuz_sentinel
   157→
   158→  local z_colophon="${1:-}"
   159→  local z_base_dir="${2:-}"
   160→  test -n "${z_colophon}" || buc_die "zbuz_exec_lookup: colophon required"
   161→  test -n "${z_base_dir}" || buc_die "zbuz_exec_lookup: base_dir required"
   162→  shift 2
   163→
   164→  local z_i
   165→  for z_i in "${!z_buz_colophon_roll[@]}"; do
   166→    if [ "${z_buz_colophon_roll[z_i]}" = "${z_colophon}" ]; then
   167→      zbuz_decode_folio "${z_buz_channel_roll[z_i]}" "$@"
   168→      exec "${z_base_dir}/${z_buz_module_roll[z_i]}" "${z_buz_command_roll[z_i]}" ${z_buz_folio_args[@]+"${z_buz_folio_args[@]}"}
   169→    fi
   170→  done
   171→
   172→  return 1
   173→}
   174→
   175→# eof
   176→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# BUTCRG - Regime smoke test cases
    20→#
    21→# Dispatches all regime render and validate tabtargets via bute_dispatch
    22→# and verifies each exits cleanly.
    23→
    24→set -euo pipefail
    25→
    26→######################################################################
    27→# Private helper: init dispatch and evidence scoped to this test case
    28→
    29→zbutcrg_init() {
    30→  bute_init_dispatch
    31→  BURD_TEMP_DIR="${BUT_TEMP_DIR}"
    32→  bute_init_evidence
    33→}
    34→
    35→zbutcrg_dispatch_ok() {
    36→  local z_colophon="${1}"
    37→  shift || true
    38→  local z_label="${z_colophon}${*:+ $*}"
    39→  buto_section "Dispatching: ${z_label}"
    40→  bute_dispatch "${z_colophon}" "$@"
    41→  local z_step
    42→  z_step=$(bute_last_step_capture) || buto_fatal "No step recorded for ${z_label}"
    43→  local z_status
    44→  z_status=$(bute_get_step_exit_capture "${z_step}")
    45→  buto_fatal_on_error "${z_status}" "Tabtarget failed" "Colophon: ${z_label}"
    46→  buto_info "OK: ${z_label} (exit ${z_status})"
    47→}
    48→
    49→######################################################################
    50→# BUK regime cases
    51→
    52→butcrg_burc_tcase() {
    53→  zbutcrg_init
    54→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "buw-rcr"
    55→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "buw-rcv"
    56→  buto_success "BURC regime render+validate passed"
    57→}
    58→
    59→butcrg_burs_tcase() {
    60→  zbutcrg_init
    61→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "buw-rsr"
    62→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "buw-rsv"
    63→  buto_success "BURS regime render+validate passed"
    64→}
    65→
    66→######################################################################
    67→# RBW regime cases
    68→
    69→butcrg_rbrn_tcase() {
    70→  zbutcrg_init
    71→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnr"
    72→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnv"
    73→
    74→  # List operation: verify rbrn_list returns non-empty, validate each moniker
    75→  buto_section "RBRN list operation"
    76→  local z_monikers
    77→  z_monikers=$(rbrn_list) || buto_fatal "rbrn_list failed"
    78→  test -n "${z_monikers}" || buto_fatal "rbrn_list returned empty"
    79→  local z_moniker
    80→  while read -r z_moniker; do
    81→    buto_info "Validating moniker: ${z_moniker}"
    82→    zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnv" "${z_moniker}"
    83→  done <<< "${z_monikers}"
    84→
    85→  buto_success "RBRN regime render+validate+list passed"
    86→}
    87→
    88→butcrg_rbrr_tcase() {
    89→  zbutcrg_init
    90→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rrr"
    91→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rrv"
    92→  buto_success "RBRR regime render+validate passed"
    93→}
    94→
    95→butcrg_rbrv_tcase() {
    96→  zbutcrg_init
    97→
    98→  source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source ${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    99→  zrbrr_kindle
   100→  zrbrr_enforce
   101→
   102→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rvr"
   103→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rvv"
   104→
   105→  # List operation: verify rbrv_list returns non-empty, validate each sigil
   106→  buto_section "RBRV list operation"
   107→  local z_sigils
   108→  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list) || buto_fatal "rbrv_list failed"
   109→  test -n "${z_sigils}" || buto_fatal "rbrv_list returned empty"
   110→  local z_sigil
   111→  while read -r z_sigil; do
   112→    buto_info "Validating sigil: ${z_sigil}"
   113→    zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rvv" "${z_sigil}"
   114→  done <<< "${z_sigils}"
   115→
   116→  buto_success "RBRV regime render+validate+list passed"
   117→}
   118→
   119→######################################################################
   120→# Payor regime case
   121→
   122→butcrg_rbrp_tcase() {
   123→  zbutcrg_init
   124→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rpr"
   125→  zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rpv"
   126→  buto_success "RBRP regime render+validate passed"
   127→}
   128→
   129→######################################################################
   130→# BURD dispatch regime case
   131→
   132→butcrg_burd_tcase() {
   133→  zbutcrg_init
   134→  buto_section "Verifying BURD dispatch environment"
   135→  zburd_sentinel
   136→  zburd_validate_fields
   137→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"      || buto_fatal "BURD_TEMP_DIR does not exist: ${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
   138→  buto_success "BURD dispatch environment verified"
   139→}
   140→
   141→# eof
   142→

content.text:
Now I have a full picture. The `bute_dispatch` passes `"$@"` as extra args to the tabtarget. The `butcrg_rbrn_tcase` calls `zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnv" "${z_moniker}"` — so the moniker is passed as a positional arg to the tabtarget, which then feeds it into BURD.

Now I understand the complete picture. Let me now analyze the warrant steps carefully:

**Step 1 (done): Read rbrr_regime.sh and rbrr_cli.sh as exemplar.**

**Step 2**: Add `buv_port_enroll`, `buv_list_cidr_enroll`, and `buv_list_domain_enroll` to `buv_validation.sh`.

**Step 3**: Restructure `rbrn_regime.sh` with enrollment.

**Step 4**: Restructure `rbrn_cli.sh`.

**Step 5**: Update `rbz_zipper.sh` - add imprint channel to nameplate colophons and bottle colophons, add missing `RBZ_BOTTLE_STOP`.

**Step 6**: Update `rbw_workbench.sh` - collapse bottle case arm.

**Step 7**: Update `rbob_cli.sh` and `rbtb_testbench.sh`.

Let me now look at the butcrg_rbrn_tcase more carefully. It calls `zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnv"` (no moniker) and `zbutcrg_dispatch_ok "rbw-rnv" "${z_moniker}"` with a moniker. With the new design, `rbw-rnv` will have imprint channel, so `BURD_TOKEN_3` will carry the moniker. When dispatched with `"${z_moniker}"` as extra arg, the tabtarget passes that as the first positional arg...

Wait, let me re-read how `bute_dispatch` works with extra args and how the tabtarget dispatches. The tabtarget calls the launcher, which dispatches to the workbench. The `bute_dispatch` passes `"$@"` to the tabtarget which passes them as CLI args. In the bud_dispatch flow, these CLI args get put into `BURD_CLI_ARGS` and `BURD_TOKEN_3`.

Let me look at the launcher to understand:

    19→# BUL Launcher - Shared launcher logic for BUK workbenches.
    20→# Sourced by individual launcher stubs in .buk/
    21→# Compatible with Bash 3.2 (e.g., macOS default shell)
    22→#
    23→# NOTE: This is bootstrap infrastructure, not a full BCG module.
    24→# No kindle/sentinel pattern - this runs before BCG modules are loaded.
    25→
    26→# Guard against multiple inclusion
    27→test -z "${ZBUL_LAUNCHER_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    28→ZBUL_LAUNCHER_SOURCED=1
    29→
    30→# Establish project root from the sourcing launcher's location
    31→ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT="${BASH_SOURCE[1]%/*}/.."
    32→cd "${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}" || exit 1
    33→
    34→# Load BURC configuration
    35→export BURD_REGIME_FILE="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/.buk/burc.env"
    36→source "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" || exit 1
    37→

    39→BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR="${BURV_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR:-${BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR}}"
    40→BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR="${BURV_TEMP_ROOT_DIR:-${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}}"
    41→
    42→# Source BUK modules and kindle BURC
    43→export BURD_STATION_FILE="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
    44→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/buc_command.sh"
    45→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/burc_regime.sh"
    46→zburc_kindle
    47→
    48→# Load BURS configuration and kindle
    49→z_station_file="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
    50→source "${z_station_file}" || exit 1
    51→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/burs_regime.sh"
    52→zburs_kindle
    53→
    54→# Helper function to delegate to BURD
    55→# Usage: bul_launch "path/to/workbench.sh" "$@"
    56→bul_launch() {
    57→  local z_coordinator="$1"
    58→  shift
    59→
    60→  # Detect terminal width via /dev/tty (survives exec chain and dispatch pipes)
    61→  # Subshell probe: /dev/tty may exist but not be openable (CI, sandbox)
    62→  BURD_TERM_COLS=80
    63→  if (exec </dev/tty) 2>/dev/null; then
    64→    BURD_TERM_COLS=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
    65→    test -n "${BURD_TERM_COLS}" || BURD_TERM_COLS=80
    66→  fi
    67→  export BURD_TERM_COLS
    68→
    69→  export BURD_COORDINATOR_SCRIPT="${z_coordinator}"
    70→  exec "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/bud_dispatch.sh" "${1##*/}" "${@:2}"
    71→}

    27→# Utility function for verbose output

    40→
    41→# String validator with optional length constraints
    42→zbud_check_string() {
    43→  local context=$1
    44→  local varname=$2
    45→  eval "local val=\${$varname:-}" || zbud_die "Variable '$varname' is not defined in '$context'"
    46→  local min=$3
    47→  local max=$4
    48→
    49→  test "$min" = "0" -a -z "$val" && return 0
    50→  test -n "$val" || zbud_die "[$context] $varname must not be empty"
    51→
    52→  if [ -n "$max" ]; then
    53→    test ${#val} -ge $min || zbud_die "[$context] $varname must be at least $min chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    54→    test ${#val} -le $max || zbud_die "[$context] $varname must be no more than $max chars, got '${val}' (${#val})"
    55→  fi
    56→}
    57→
    58→# Source configuration and setup environment
    59→zbud_setup() {
    60→  zbud_show "Starting BDU setup"
    61→
    62→  source            "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}"
    63→
    64→  # Apply BURV (Bash Utility Regime Verification) overrides if set

    66→  BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR="${BURV_TEMP_ROOT_DIR:-${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}}"
    67→
    68→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_STATION_FILE        1 256
    69→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_LOG_LAST            1 256
    70→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_LOG_EXT             1 32
    71→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_TABTARGET_DIR       1 256
    72→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_TABTARGET_DELIMITER 1 8
    73→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR       1 256
    74→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR     1 256
    75→  zbud_check_string "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" BURC_TOOLS_DIR           1 256
    76→
    77→  # Source station file

    80→
    81→  # Validate station variables

    83→
    84→  BURD_NOW_STAMP=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')-$$-$((RANDOM % 1000))

    86→
    87→  BURD_TEMP_DIR="${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}/temp-${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"

    97→    echo "ERROR: Failed to create temporary directory: ${BURD_TEMP_DIR}" >&2
    98→    return 1
    99→  fi

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2024 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate - Validator Module

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBRN_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBRN_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbrn_*)

zrbrn_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn already kindled"

  # Set defaults for all fields (enrollment enforces required-ness)
  RBRN_MONIKER="${RBRN_MONIKER:-}"
  RBRN_DESCRIPTION="${RBRN_DESCRIPTION:-}"
  RBRN_RUNTIME="${RBRN_RUNTIME:-}"
  RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL="${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL:-}"
  RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL="${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL:-}"
  RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION:-}"
  RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION:-}"
  RBRN_ENTRY_MODE="${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE:-}"
  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP:-}"
  RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK:-}"
  RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP:-}"
  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP:-}"
  RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN="${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN:-}"
  RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE:-}"
  RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE:-}"
  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS:-}"
  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS:-}"
  RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS="${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS:-}"

  # Detect unexpected RBRN_ variables
  local z_known="RBRN_MONIKER RBRN_DESCRIPTION RBRN_RUNTIME RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION RBRN_ENTRY_MODE RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS"
  ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED=()
  local z_var
  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRN_); do
    case " ${z_known} " in
      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
      *) ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    esac
  done

  # Die on unexpected variables
  if test ${#ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
    buc_die "Unexpected RBRN_ variables: ${ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
  fi

  # Enroll all RBRN variables for validation via buv_vet/buv_report

  # Core nameplate identification
  buv_xname_enroll   RBRN  RBRN_MONIKER                 "" ""
  buv_string_enroll  RBRN  RBRN_DESCRIPTION              "" ""  0  120
  buv_string_enroll  RBRN  RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS            "" ""  0  240

  # Container runtime
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_RUNTIME                  "" ""  docker podman

  # Entry mode
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENTRY_MODE               "" ""  disabled enabled

  # Container image configuration
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL            "" ""
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL            "" ""
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION      "" ""
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION      "" ""

  # Enclave network configuration
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP          "" ""
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP        "" ""
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP        "" ""
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN  RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK          "" ""  8  30

  # Uplink configuration
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN          "" ""
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE          "" ""  disabled global allowlist
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE       "" ""  disabled global allowlist

  # Gated: entry ports (only when ENTRY_MODE=enabled)
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION   RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE       RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled

  # Gated: allowlist variables
  buv_list_cidr_enroll   RBRN  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE  allowlist
  buv_list_domain_enroll RBRN  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS  RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE     allowlist

  # Build docker env args array for container injection
  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV=()
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_DESCRIPTION=${RBRN_DESCRIPTION}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL=${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL=${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_MODE=${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN=${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS}")
  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS=${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS}")

  ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrn_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRN enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrn_enforce() {
  zrbrn_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRN

  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"

  # Cross-port check (entry ports must be less than uplink port min)
  if test "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" = "enabled"; then
    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Public Functions (rbrn_*)

# List available nameplate monikers
# Usage: rbrn_list
# Returns list of concrete nameplate monikers by globbing rbrn_*.env files
rbrn_list() {
  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}"*"${RBCC_rbrn_ext}")

  for z_file in "${z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
    test -f "${z_file}" || continue
    local z_basename="${z_file##*/}"
    local z_moniker="${z_basename#${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}}"
    z_moniker="${z_moniker%${RBCC_rbrn_ext}}"
    echo "${z_moniker}"
  done
}

######################################################################
# Cross-Nameplate Functions
#
# These iterate all nameplates by direct-sourcing .env files in
# subshells to avoid kindle-once guard conflicts.
#
# rbrn_preflight: Requires RBCC kindled
# rbrn_survey:    Requires RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded
# rbrn_audit:     Requires RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded

# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
}

# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
  fi
}

# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
rbrn_preflight() {
  zrbcc_sentinel

  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via subshell sourcing
  local z_data
  z_data=$(
    for z_m in $(rbrn_list); do
      z_f="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}${z_m}${RBCC_rbrn_ext}"
      (
        source "${z_f}"
        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
      )
    done
  )

  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
  local z_ws_port_keys=()
  local z_ws_port_vals=()
  local z_enc_port_keys=()
  local z_enc_port_vals=()
  local z_ip_keys=()
  local z_ip_vals=()
  local z_net_starts=()
  local z_net_ends=()
  local z_net_owners=()

  local z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle
  while IFS='|' read -r z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle; do
    test -n "${z_mon}" || continue

    # Workstation and enclave port uniqueness (enabled entries only)
    if [[ "${z_entry}" == "enabled" ]]; then
      local z_i
      for z_i in "${!z_ws_port_keys[@]}"; do
        if [[ "${z_ws_port_keys[$z_i]}" == "${z_ws}" ]]; then
          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${z_ws} claimed by both ${z_ws_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
        fi
      done
      z_ws_port_keys+=("${z_ws}")
      z_ws_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")

      for z_i in "${!z_enc_port_keys[@]}"; do
        if [[ "${z_enc_port_keys[$z_i]}" == "${z_enc}" ]]; then
          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${z_enc} claimed by both ${z_enc_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
        fi
      done
      z_enc_port_keys+=("${z_enc}")
      z_enc_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
    fi

    # Enclave IP uniqueness (all sentry and bottle IPs across nameplates)
    local z_j
    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" == "${z_sentry}" ]]; then
        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_sentry} claimed by ${z_mon} (sentry) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
      fi
    done
    z_ip_keys+=("${z_sentry}")
    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:sentry")

    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" == "${z_bottle}" ]]; then
        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_bottle} claimed by ${z_mon} (bottle) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
      fi
    done
    z_ip_keys+=("${z_bottle}")
    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:bottle")

    # Subnet non-overlap
    local z_net_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
    local z_net_mask_bits=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
    local z_net_addr=$(( z_net_int & z_net_mask_bits ))
    local z_net_size=$(( 1 << (32 - z_mask) ))
    local z_net_end=$(( z_net_addr + z_net_size - 1 ))

    local z_k
    for z_k in "${!z_net_starts[@]}"; do
      if [[ ${z_net_addr} -le ${z_net_ends[$z_k]} ]] && [[ ${z_net_starts[$z_k]} -le ${z_net_end} ]]; then
        buc_die "Subnet overlap: ${z_base}/${z_mask} (${z_mon}) overlaps with network of ${z_net_owners[$z_k]}"
      fi
    done
    z_net_starts+=("${z_net_addr}")
    z_net_ends+=("${z_net_end}")
    z_net_owners+=("${z_mon}")

  done <<< "${z_data}"
}

# Fleet info table — non-opinionated display of all nameplate configuration
# Requires: RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded
rbrn_survey() {
  zrbcc_sentinel
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zrbgd_sentinel
  zrbrr_sentinel

  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"

  echo ""
  printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
    "Moniker" "Entry" "WS" "Enc" "Subnet" "Sentry IP" "Bottle IP" "Snt" "Btl"
  printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
    "--------" "-----" "------" "------" "-----------------" "--------------" "--------------" "---" "---"

  local z_moniker z_file
  for z_moniker in $(rbrn_list); do
    z_file="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}${z_moniker}${RBCC_rbrn_ext}"
    (
      source "${z_file}"

      local z_sentry_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
      local z_bottle_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"

      local z_sentry_local="--"
      local z_bottle_local="--"
      if command -v "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_sentry_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_sentry_local="ok"
        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_bottle_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_bottle_local="ok"
      else
        z_sentry_local="??"
        z_bottle_local="??"
      fi

      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
      if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" != "enabled" ]]; then
        z_ws_port="-"
        z_enc_port="-"
      fi

      printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
        "${RBRN_MONIKER}" "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" "${z_ws_port}" "${z_enc_port}" \
        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" \
        "${z_sentry_local}" "${z_bottle_local}"
    )
  done
  echo ""
}

# Audit — survey display then preflight validation
rbrn_audit() {
  rbrn_survey
  rbrn_preflight
  buc_step "Cross-nameplate audit passed"
}

# eof

content.text:
Now let me look at the current rbrr_cli.sh more carefully for the furnish pattern. In `rbrr_cli.sh`:
- `zrbrr_furnish()` calls `zbuv_kindle`, `zburd_kindle`, `zrbcc_kindle`, then sources `${RBCC_rbrr_file}` (already done at top-level), calls `zrbrr_kindle`, `zrbrr_enforce`.

For `rbrn_cli.sh`, the furnish needs to:
1. Call `zbuv_kindle`, then `zburd_kindle`, then `zrbcc_kindle`
2. If `RBR0_FOLIO` is non-empty: construct path = `RBCC_KIT_DIR + "/" + RBCC_rbrn_prefix + RBR0_FOLIO + RBCC_rbrn_ext`, source it, call `zrbrn_kindle`, `zrbrn_enforce`

Note: In `rbrr_cli.sh`, `source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"` is at the top level BEFORE furnish is called. But for `rbrn_cli.sh`, the nameplate file depends on `RBR0_FOLIO` which is only known at furnish time.

Looking at the current `rbrn_cli.sh`, the source block has `rbrn_regime.sh` before `rbcc_Constants.sh`. In the new design, I need to source `burd_regime.sh` before `rbrn_regime.sh`.

Let me also look at what commands the survey/audit commands need (they source additional deps). In the current code, survey/audit sources rbgc, rbgd, rbrr, rbgo inline. In the new design, these should "source their additional deps internally."

Now let me write the new `rbrn_cli.sh`:

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBRN CLI - Command line interface for RBRN nameplate operations

set -euo pipefail

ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"

# Source dependencies
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/burd_regime.sh"
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcr_render.sh"

######################################################################
# Command Functions

# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
rbrn_validate() {
  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRN nameplate regime configuration via enrollment report"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Validating RBRN nameplate regime"
  buv_report RBRN "Nameplate Regime"
  buc_step "RBRN nameplate valid"
}

# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
rbrn_render() {
  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRN nameplate regime configuration"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  zrbcr_kindle

  # Display header
  echo ""
  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRN - Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate${ZBUC_RESET}"
  echo ""

  # Core Service Identity
  rbcr_section_begin "Core Service Identity"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_MONIKER              xname   req  "Unique identifier for Bottle Service"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_DESCRIPTION          string  opt  "Human-readable description"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_RUNTIME              enum    req  "Container runtime: docker or podman"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Container Image Configuration
  rbcr_section_begin "Container Image Configuration"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL        fqin    req  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL        fqin    req  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION  fqin    req  "Consecration tag for Sentry Image"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION  fqin    req  "Consecration tag for Bottle Image"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Entry Service Configuration (gated by ENTRY_MODE)
  rbcr_section_begin "Entry Service Configuration" RBRN_ENTRY_MODE enabled
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_MODE              enum  req   "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION  port  cond  "External port on Transit Network"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE      port  cond  "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Enclave Network Configuration
  rbcr_section_begin "Enclave Network Configuration"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP      ipv4     req  "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK      decimal  req  "Network mask width (8-30)"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP    ipv4     req  "IP address for Sentry Container"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP    ipv4     req  "IP address for Bottle Container"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Uplink Core
  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink Core"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN      port  req  "Minimum port for outbound connections"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE      enum  req  "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE   enum  req  "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Uplink DNS Allowlist (gated by DNS_MODE)
  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink DNS Allowlist" RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE allowlist
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS  domain_list  cond  "Allowed DNS domains"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Uplink Access Allowlist (gated by ACCESS_MODE)
  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink Access Allowlist" RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE allowlist
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS  cidr_list  cond  "Allowed CIDR ranges"
  rbcr_section_end

  # Volume Mount Configuration
  rbcr_section_begin "Volume Mount Configuration"
  rbcr_section_item RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS  string  opt  "Volume mount arguments for Bottle"
  rbcr_section_end

  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRN nameplate valid${ZBUC_RESET}"
}

# Command: survey - fleet info table across all nameplates
rbrn_survey() {
  buc_doc_brief "Display fleet info table for all nameplate configurations"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Additional dependencies for cross-nameplate operations
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
  source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
  zrbgc_kindle
  zrbrr_kindle
  zrbrr_enforce
  zrbgo_kindle
  zrbgd_kindle

  rbrn_survey
}

# Command: audit - survey display then preflight validation
rbrn_audit() {
  buc_doc_brief "Survey all nameplates and run cross-nameplate preflight validation"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Additional dependencies for cross-nameplate operations
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
  source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
  source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
  zrbgc_kindle
  zrbrr_kindle
  zrbrr_enforce
  zrbgo_kindle
  zrbgd_kindle

  rbrn_audit

  # GCB quota headroom check (requires Director SA token)
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get token for GCB quota check"
  rbgd_check_gcb_quota "${z_token}"
  buc_step "Full audit passed (nameplates + GCB quota)"
}

######################################################################
# Furnish and Main

zrbrn_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "RBR0_FOLIO" "Nameplate moniker (e.g., nsproto); empty for list/survey/audit"

  zbuv_kindle
  zburd_kindle
  zrbcc_kindle

  # If RBR0_FOLIO is set, load and kindle the specified nameplate
  if test -n "${RBR0_FOLIO:-}"; then
    local z_nameplate_file="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}${RBR0_FOLIO}${RBCC_rbrn_ext}"
    test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    source "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    zrbrn_kindle
    zrbrn_enforce
  fi
}

buc_execute rbrn_ "Recipe Bottle Nameplate Regime" zrbrn_furnish "$@"

# eof
